tier_rationale: Pays for systems out of operating budget. Margin pressure makes ops automation a board-level concern. Multi-seat opportunity.
tagline: Founder of a 5-15 person shop where every margin point is fought for and process drift kills profitability.

psychographics.self_identity: I built a craft business and accidentally became a CEO.
psychographics.core_belief: Process is what separates a real firm from a job with extra steps.
psychographics.fear: Becoming the bottleneck on every project, then watching margin disappear.
psychographics.ambition: An agency that delivers without the founder in every meeting.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Being seen as a freelancer pretending to be an agency.

pain_points.pain: Project profitability is invisible until invoices land
Every senior leaving threatens 30% of capacity
PMs reinvent the wheel on each engagement
Sales pipeline lives in the founder's head

desired_outcomes.outcome: Standardized delivery playbooks PMs actually use
Margin visibility per client per week
Sales pipeline that operates without founder
Knowledge captured so churn doesn't reset the firm

buying_triggers.trigger: Just lost a senior employee with critical client knowledge
Major client account at risk due to process slip
About to pitch a strategic acquirer / due diligence prep

objections.objection: Adoption is the killer — my team won't use it
objections.counter_angle: Show install path that piggybacks on existing tools (Slack/Email/Drive).
Position EPOS as the connective tissue, not a replacement.

objections.objection: Cost is a problem when margins are tight
objections.counter_angle: Lead with margin-recovery math: one rescued account pays for two years.

objections.objection: I need it customized to our delivery model
objections.counter_angle: Niche pack + sovereign install = customizable, owned, evolving.

communication_preferences.vocabulary: Margin, utilization, capacity, retention, throughput, EBITDA
communication_preferences.proof_type: Margin recovery numbers + named agency case studies

conversion_path.awareness: Operator essay on agency margin death spirals or retention math
conversion_path.consideration: Mirror Report quantifying recoverable margin + named gaps
conversion_path.decision: Installation engagement (4-8 weeks) with margin guarantee
conversion_path.retention: Quarterly margin reviews + new module rollouts
